frontmatter.title: Circular Hub
frontmatter.title_sub: LINKaran HUBung: Community Integration through Ecosystem, Culinary & Education
frontmatter.abstract:
This project signifies a transformative change at Jakarta’s Kebon Melati Reservoir (KMR), establishing connections among communities through a circular design, inclusive culinary spaces, and versatile platforms. The primary objectives include boosting the local economy and addressing Nature Deficit Disorder, creating a harmonious environment for community growth.
Established in 1966, KMR holds a vital role in Jakarta, strategically positioned between slums and commercial areas, near landmarks like Grand Indonesia Mall, Thamrin Residence, and Mall. Serving as a connecting bridge, the reservoir dynamically transforms, reflecting the principles of Jurgen Habermas, the German philosopher.
frontmatter.pr_contributor: Arnott Ferels, Steven Verdianta & Billy Kurniawan
frontmatter.pr_type: Collaborative work in the National Student Competition by Bandung Institute of Technology (Gaung Bandung)

mdx.body:
# Generate: Inclusive Architectural Solutions for Community Enrichment
![Generate 01 (Creating a bridge using a ramp to connect various societies)](./figures/circular-hub-generate-01.jpg "Generate 01 (Creating a bridge using a ramp to connect various societies)") Generate 01 (Creating a bridge using a ramp to connect various societies).
![Generate 02 (Developing a versatile platform for inclusive social and spatial activities)](./figures/circular-hub-generate-02.jpg "Generate 02 Developing a versatile platform for inclusive social and spatial activities)") Generate 02 (Developing a versatile platform for inclusive social and spatial activities).
![Generate 03 (Utilizing a circular shape to eliminate spatial boundaries)](./figures/circular-hub-generate-03.jpg "Generate 03 Utilizing a circular shape to eliminate spatial boundaries)") Generate 03 (Utilizing a circular shape to eliminate spatial boundaries).
![Generate 04 (Implementing an Inclusive Culinary Kiosk platform to boost the local community’s economic condition around the KMR)](./figures/circular-hub-generate-04.jpg "Generate 04 (Implementing an Inclusive Culinary Kiosk platform to boost the local community’s economic condition around the KMR)") Generate 04 (Implementing an Inclusive Culinary Kiosk platform to boost the local community’s economic condition around the KMR).
![Generate 05 (Implementing a shading roof for those on the move and establishing an area for thriving jasmine flowers)](./figures/circular-hub-generate-05.jpg "Generate 05 Implementing a shading roof for those on the move and establishing an area for thriving jasmine flowers)") Generate 05 (Implementing a shading roof for those on the move and establishing an area for thriving jasmine flowers).
# Programs: Ecosystem Integration for Community Enhancement ![The Inclusive Culinary Kiosk](./figures/circular-hub-programs.jpg "The Inclusive Culinary Kiosk") The Inclusive Culinary Kiosk. The Inclusive Culinary Kiosk fosters a culinary-inclusive business area for economic activity and social interaction. The Platform addresses Nature Deficit Disorder, utilizing Kebon Melati Reservoir's clean water to calm the mind.
![Site Plan](./figures/circular-hub-site-plan.jpg "Site Plan") Site Plan.
![Inclusive Culinary Kiosk](./figures/circular-hub-pers-inclusive-culinary-kiosk.jpg "Inclusive Culinary Kiosk") Inclusive Culinary Kiosk.
![The Platform](./figures/circular-hub-pers-the-platform.jpg "The Platform") The Platform.
# Activities: Holistic Platforms for Community Integration ![Activities](./figures/circular-hub-activities.jpg "Activities") Activities. # Publication - Page 58: [https://issuu.com/gaung-bandung/docs/gaung_bandung_2018/58](https://issuu.com/gaung-bandung/docs/gaung_bandung_2018/58 "Page 58") - Page 59: [https://issuu.com/gaung-bandung/docs/gaung_bandung_2018/59](https://issuu.com/gaung-bandung/docs/gaung_bandung_2018/59 "Page 59")
